mapper.select: SELECT u.position AS position,u.username AS username FROM test_team t LEFT JOIN test_technicist tr ON t.id = tr.team_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON tr.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.id = 1

SELECT id FROM ( SELECT t1.id, t1.NAME, t1.del_flag, CASE WHEN find_in_set(pid, @pids) > 0 THEN @pids := concat(@pids, ',', id) ELSE 0 END ischild FROM (SELECT id, pid, NAME, del_flag FROM test_team ORDER BY pid, id) t1, (SELECT @pids := ( SELECT team_id FROM test_technicist WHERE user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = 0 )) t2 ) t3 WHERE ischild != 0 AND del_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT team_id FROM test_technicist WHERE del_flag = 0 AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id FROM test_team WHERE pid = 0
SELECT id as id, NAME name, pid as pid FROM test_team WHERE del_flag = 0

SELECT id, check_item_id, team_id FROM test_check_item_team_rel
team_id in
#{id}
limit 1
SELECT team_id FROM test_technicist WHERE user_id = #{userId}
